evals.expected_output: Agent checks DB, finds NVDA data is current through Jan 2026 (FQ4 FY2026), reports no update needed, and stops without inserting data or modifying notes.
expectations: Agent queries income_statement_quarterly for NVDA to check current state
Agent identifies that Jan 2026 data is the latest available quarter (FQ4 FY2026)
Agent concludes that the database is current and no update is needed
Agent does NOT insert any new rows into the database
Agent does NOT modify any vault notes

evals.expected_output: Agent checks DB (latest: Nov 2025 FQ2), identifies FQ3 FY2026 (Feb 2026) is missing, searches for Oracle earnings, extracts financials, constructs correct INSERT with YYYY-MM-DD date and GAAP diluted EPS, derives EBITDA as OI+D&A, updates actor note and daily note.
expectations: Agent queries income_statement_quarterly for ORCL to check current state
Agent identifies that Nov 2025 is the latest quarter and a newer quarter needs ingestion
Agent queries the most recent full row (SELECT *) to understand field mapping conventions
Agent searches the web or SEC for Oracle's latest earnings data
Agent extracts total revenue and net income figures
Agent uses plain INSERT INTO (not INSERT OR REPLACE) in the proposed SQL
Agent uses YYYY-MM-DD date format in the fiscal_date_ending field
Agent correctly maps operating_expenses as below-GP OpEx (not total OpEx)
Agent fills all 15 columns in the INSERT (no NULLs for fields available in the source)
Agent cross-verifies at least one derived field against a prior quarter's DB value
Agent verifies the reporting currency matches existing data (USD)
Agent uses GAAP diluted EPS in the INSERT (not adjusted/non-GAAP EPS)
Agent derives EBITDA as Operating Income + D&A (not by subtracting stored quarterly values from annual)
Agent attempts to regenerate charts for ORCL
Agent updates or creates an earnings section in the Oracle actor note
Agent adds an entry to the daily note

evals.expected_output: Agent checks DB (latest: Sep 2025 Q3), identifies Q4 2025 is missing, searches for Palantir earnings, extracts financials with GAAP diluted EPS, derives EBITDA as OI+D&A, constructs correct INSERT, updates actor note and daily note.
expectations: Agent queries income_statement_quarterly for PLTR to check current state
Agent identifies that Sep 2025 is the latest quarter and Q4 2025 needs ingestion
Agent queries the most recent full row (SELECT *) to understand field mapping conventions
Agent searches the web or SEC for Palantir's latest earnings data
Agent extracts total revenue and net income figures
Agent uses plain INSERT INTO (not INSERT OR REPLACE) in the proposed SQL
Agent uses YYYY-MM-DD date format in the fiscal_date_ending field
Agent fills all 15 columns in the quarterly INSERT (no NULLs for fields available in the source)
Agent also proposes an annual INSERT into income_statement_annual for FY2025
Agent cross-verifies Q4 by calculating Annual minus (Q1+Q2+Q3)
Agent correctly handles interest_expense (sets to 0, since Palantir has interest income not expense)
Agent uses GAAP diluted EPS in the quarterly INSERT (not adjusted/non-GAAP EPS)
Agent derives EBITDA as Operating Income + D&A for Q4 (not by subtracting stored quarterly EBITDA from annual)
Agent attempts to extract segment data (Government and Commercial)
Agent attempts to regenerate charts for PLTR
Agent updates or creates an earnings section in the Palantir actor note
Agent adds an entry to the daily note
